name: Passover Fruit Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the fruits in a bowl and set aside.
2. In another bowl, beat together the eggs, sugar, and oil.
3. Add the matzo meal, fruit mixture, raisins, and pineapple juice to the egg mixture. Stir until combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 12 x 7-inch baking pan.
5. Sprinkle with cinnamon and nuts, if desired.
6. Bake in a preheated oven until golden brown.
